title: Golden Roasted Middle Eastern Lentils Mujadara
description: A comforting and flavorful Middle Eastern dish featuring roasted lentils and caramelized onions, perfect for a sick day. This egg-free friendly recipe is made in a bamboo steamer and infused with the sweetness of oranges.
instructions: Rinse the lentils and soak them in water for 30 minutes, then drain and set aside.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and caramelize the onions for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the lentils, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the lentil mixture to a bamboo steamer lined with parchment paper.
Steam the lentils over boiling water for 20 minutes, or until they are tender and fluffy.
While the lentils are cooking, mix the orange juice and zest in a small bowl.
Once the lentils are done, fluff them with a fork and stir in the orange juice mixture.
Serve the Golden Roasted Middle Eastern Lentils Mujadara hot, garnished with caramelized onions and a sprinkle of salt.
